display_name: MiMo-V2-Pro is Xiaomi's flagship reasoning and agentic foundation model, built on a trillion-parameter MoE architecture with 42B active parameters and up to 1M-token context. It excels at complex reas
description:
MiMo-V2-Pro is Xiaomi's flagship reasoning and agentic foundation model, built on a trillion-parameter MoE architecture with 42B active parameters and up to 1M-token context. It excels at complex reasoning, coding, and agentic workloads, ranking among the global top tier on agent benchmarks.

Notes:
Context Window: 1M tokens
Max Output: 128K tokens

This bot supports optional parameters for additional customization.
